sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: The Permian Juggernaut: A Comprehensive Research Feature on Diamondback Energy (FANG)
feed.summary: Diamondback Energy (FANG) has transformed into a dominant "Permian Juggernaut" after its 2024 merger with Endeavor Energy Resources, becoming a benchmark for operational excellence in the Midland Basin. The company focuses on capital discipline and aggressive shareholder returns, making it an attractive option for investors seeking exposure to North America's most prolific oil field. Diamondback's strategic acquisitions, vertical integration, and innovative technologies have fueled its impressive stock performance and strong financial profile, positioning it as a leader in the consolidating Permian Basin.

feed.title: Barclays Issues Positive Forecast for Simon Property Group (NYSE:SPG) Stock Price
feed.summary: Barclays has raised its price target for Simon Property Group (NYSE:SPG) to $201.00 from $193.00, maintaining an "equal weight" rating, suggesting a potential upside of 0.45%. Other analysts have also adjusted their targets, with the company currently holding an average "Hold" rating and a consensus price target of $200.14. Simon Property Group recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and authorized a $2.00 billion share repurchase program, indicating management views the stock as undervalued.

feed.title: Targa Resources (NYSE:TRGP) Given New $285.00 Price Target at Truist Financial
feed.summary: Truist Financial has increased its price target for Targa Resources (NYSE:TRGP) to $285.00 from $279.00, maintaining a "buy" rating and implying a 16.76% upside. This comes as Targa Resources' shares opened at $244.09, with a market cap of $52.43 billion, and analysts project an 8.15 EPS for the current year. The consensus rating from analysts remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $257.14, despite recent insider stock sales totaling approximately $24.7 million.

feed.title: Barclays Lowers Gen Digital (NASDAQ:GEN) Price Target to $26.00
feed.summary: Barclays has reduced its price target for Gen Digital (NASDAQ:GEN) from $32.00 to $26.00, maintaining an "equal weight" rating, indicating a potential upside of 42.66% from its last close. Despite beating Q4 earnings estimates with $0.64 EPS and 25.8% year-over-year revenue growth, the cybersecurity stock is trading near its 12-month low and carries a high debt-to-equity ratio of 3.50. The company, which has a market cap of approximately $11 billion, has a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average target price of $31.86.

feed.title: Public Storage price target lowered to $309 from $311 at Evercore ISI
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has reduced its price target for Public Storage (PSA) to $309 from $311, while maintaining an "In Line" rating on the shares. This adjustment is part of the firm's Q1 storage REIT preview ahead of the upcoming earnings season. The report highlights analyst expectations and recent financial activities related to Public Storage.

feed.title: Northrop Grumman advances Sentinel ICBM development By Investing.com
feed.summary: Northrop Grumman is making significant progress on its $95.7 billion Sentinel intercontinental ballistic missile program, with initial flight targeted for 2027 and operational capability by the early 2030s. The company has completed key testing milestones, assembled the first booster, and invested heavily in infrastructure and R&D for the program, which will replace the Minuteman III. Northrop Grumman's stock has risen 18.5% year-to-date, reflecting investor confidence, and analysts have recently raised price targets for the defense contractor.

feed.title: DOD formalizes $4.7 billion Lockheed Martin PAC-3 missile contract
feed.summary: The Department of Defense has awarded Lockheed Martin Corp. a $4.7 billion contract for PAC-3 Missile Segment Enhancement interceptors, with work extending until June 30, 2030, and including tasks in Huntsville. This contract supports accelerated production to increase inventory and strengthen readiness, complementing a previous agreement with Boeing to boost PAC-3 missile seeker production. These investments by the U.S. Army and through foreign military sales aim to enhance national security, industrial growth, and technological advancement.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Boosts Occidental Petroleum (NYSE:OXY) Price Target to $64.00
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has raised its price target for Occidental Petroleum (NYSE:OXY) to $64.00 from $63.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating and implying a 9.35% upside. Analyst sentiment for OXY is mixed, with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $60.39. Despite a revenue miss, Occidental Petroleum recently beat EPS expectations in its latest quarterly earnings report.

feed.title: ASML (NASDAQ:ASML) Earns Buy Rating from JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has reiterated a "Buy" rating on ASML's stock, with other analysts generally maintaining positive outlooks and an average target price of $1,482.50. The company, a leader in photolithography systems for semiconductor manufacturing, has a market capitalization of $576.1 billion and a current share price of $1,464.87. Institutional investors and hedge funds hold a significant portion of ASML's stock.

feed.title: CF Industries (NYSE: CF): From Fertilizer Giant to Low-Carbon Energy Leader
feed.summary: CF Industries (NYSE: CF) has transformed from an agricultural fertilizer company into a leader in the low-carbon energy economy, becoming the world's largest producer of ammonia. The company is leveraging its manufacturing footprint and strategic location to capitalize on decarbonization efforts, focusing on blue ammonia and carbon capture projects. This shift, coupled with strong financial performance and a strategic leadership transition, positions CF as a significant player in both food security and clean energy, despite potential risks from feedstock volatility and policy changes.

feed.title: Fund Update: 183,643 QUANTA SERVICES (PWR) shares added to Sarasin & Partners LLP portfolio
feed.summary: Sarasin & Partners LLP has increased its holdings in Quanta Services (PWR) by adding 183,643 shares to its portfolio, as per a recent SEC 13F filing for the 03-31-2026 report period. The article also details significant institutional investor activity, insider trading, congressional stock trading, and current analyst ratings with price targets for PWR.

feed.title: Conagra Brands names Smucker executive John Brase as new CEO
feed.summary: Conagra Brands has appointed J.M. Smucker executive John Brase as its new CEO, effective June 1. Brase will succeed Sean Connolly, who is stepping down after 11 years, as Conagra navigates softening consumer spending and global trade tensions. The company recently lowered its annual profit forecast and is addressing shifting consumer tastes, including those influenced by GLP-1 drugs for weight loss.

feed.title: Dutch regulator notifies European Commission of plan to seek EU approval for Tesla's FSD
feed.summary: The Dutch vehicle authority RDW has informed the European Commission of its intention to seek EU-wide approval for Tesla's Full-Self Driving (FSD) system. This move was confirmed by Bernd van Nieuwenhoven, general manager of type approvals at the regulator, to Reuters. The notification suggests a step towards broader adoption of Tesla's autonomous driving technology across the European Union.

feed.title: Seaport Global Sticks to Its Buy Rating for Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG)
feed.summary: Seaport Global has reiterated its Buy rating for Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG), setting a price target of $330.00. This follows similar Buy ratings from other analysts like Barclays, while Mizuho Securities maintained a Hold rating. Constellation Energy reported a quarterly revenue of $5.46 billion and a net profit of $432 million for the quarter ending December 31.

feed.title: Japan Post unit trims AFLAC (NYSE: AFL) stake with 86K-share sale
feed.summary: Japan Post Holdings Co., Ltd., a 10% owner of Aflac Inc., indirectly sold 86,155 shares of Aflac common stock in open-market transactions on April 9, 2026. The sales occurred at weighted average prices ranging from $112.50 to $113.74 per share. Following these transactions, Japan Post-associated entities indirectly held 51,636,945 Aflac shares.

feed.title: Fidelity National Information Services (NYSE:FIS) Price Target Cut to $65.00 by Analysts at The Goldman Sachs Group
feed.summary: The Goldman Sachs Group has cut its price target for Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) to $65.00 from $70.00 but maintained a "buy" rating, implying a potential 48.9% upside. This adjustment comes amidst similar target cuts from other brokers, yet the analyst consensus remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average target of $68.71. FIS recently reported slightly missed EPS at $1.68 but beat revenue estimates at $2.81 billion, and its CEO made a significant insider purchase of approximately $1.0 million.

feed.title: Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) Given New $67.00 Price Target at Royal Bank Of Canada
feed.summary: Royal Bank of Canada has adjusted its price target for Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) to $67.00 from $68.00 while maintaining an "outperform" rating, indicating a potential 10.43% upside. This adjustment follows the company missing quarterly EPS and revenue expectations, though Equity Residential has issued Q1 and FY 2026 guidance. Despite the target cut, analysts surveyed by MarketBeat hold a consensus "Hold" rating with an average target of $69.53.

feed.title: Devon Energy (NYSE:DVN) Price Target Raised to $53.00
feed.summary: Jefferies Financial Group has raised its price target for Devon Energy (NYSE:DVN) to $53.00 from $44.00, maintaining a "hold" rating and implying a 9.35% upside. This adjustment aligns with a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating and an average price target of $53.11 from other firms like Truist, BMO, RBC, and Morgan Stanley, which have also increased their targets for the energy company. Devon Energy recently reported a slight earnings beat with $0.82 EPS against estimates of $0.81, and revenues of $4.12 billion, continuing to see institutional investor activity.

feed.title: DuPont de Nemours (NYSE:DD) Price Target Raised to $60.00 at BMO Capital Markets
feed.summary: BMO Capital Markets raised its price target for DuPont de Nemours (NYSE:DD) to $60.00 from $25.10, maintaining an "outperform" rating, indicating a potential upside of 27.33%. Several other analysts also increased their price targets on DD recently. The company recently reported better-than-expected quarterly EPS of $0.46 and provided FY2026 guidance of $2.25–$2.30 EPS.

feed.title: Humana (NYSE:HUM) Price Target Raised to $220.00
feed.summary: Truist Financial has increased its price target for Humana (NYSE:HUM) to $220.00 from $200.00, reiterating a "hold" rating on the insurance provider's stock. This new target implies a potential upside of approximately 15.59% from Humana's current price. The company recently reported quarterly earnings that surpassed expectations, with an EPS of ($3.96) against an estimated ($4.01) and revenue of $32.64 billion.

feed.title: Day One Biopharmaceuticals stock reaches 52-week high of $21.48
feed.summary: Day One Biopharmaceuticals (DAWN) stock recently hit a 52-week high of $21.48, showcasing a 201.54% impressive 1-year return and a 130% year-to-date gain, with a market capitalization of $2.22 billion. This surge is likely due to biopharmaceutical advancements and strategic initiatives, despite TradingPro suggesting it's currently overvalued. However, the company is being acquired by Servier for $2.5 billion ($21.50 per share), leading to several analyst downgrades to Neutral or Hold ratings.

feed.title: SEC Dismisses FAT Brands Enforcement Case
feed.summary: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission has dismissed its civil enforcement action against FAT Brands, Inc. and several of its executives, including Andrew Wiederhorn, Ron Roe, and Rebecca D. Hershinger. The dismissal, filed on March 27, 2026, was made with prejudice, meaning the claims cannot be refiled, and was based on evidence developed during discovery. This resolution concludes a high-profile securities case without the imposition of monetary penalties or injunctive relief against the defendants.

feed.title: CoStar Group Inc stock (US22160N1090): Is its real estate data dominance strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: CoStar Group Inc. (US22160N1090) leverages its comprehensive real estate data platforms, like CoStar Suite and LoopNet, to provide crucial insights for commercial real estate decisions in the U.S. and English-speaking markets. The company's subscription-based model and strategic acquisitions, along with its expansion into residential data via Homes.com, position it for sustained growth amid evolving economic conditions and increased demand for data-driven strategies. While analysts generally view CoStar positively for its dominant market position and recurring revenue, they caution on valuation and risks such as prolonged high interest rates and regulatory scrutiny.

feed.title: BMO Capital raises CMS Energy stock price target on rate relief
feed.summary: BMO Capital has increased its price target for CMS Energy (NYSE:CMS) to $86 from $80, maintaining an Outperform rating. The firm anticipates CMS Energy will report positive first-quarter 2026 earnings, driven by rate relief and normalized operations, despite expected increases in operations and maintenance expenses. Investors are also focusing on potential large load contracts and regulatory compacts in Michigan, while InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock might be overvalued despite its consistent dividend increases.

feed.title: T. Rowe Price Sees March-End AUM Dip Amid Market Weakness
feed.summary: T. Rowe Price Group (NASDAQ: TROW) reported a decline in assets under management (AUM) to $1.71 trillion at the end of March, down from $1.80 trillion in February, primarily due to market weakness and investor outflows. Despite the overall dip, net outflows improved from $5.3 billion in February to $3.2 billion in March, suggesting a potential stabilization in investor sentiment. The firm's significant equity exposure made it vulnerable to market fluctuations, and future AUM performance will largely depend on market recovery and improved net inflows, especially in its multi-asset and fixed-income offerings.

feed.title: Oppenheimer Adjusts KKR & Co Price Target to $140 From $187, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Oppenheimer has revised its price target for KKR & Co (KKR) to $140, down from the previous $187, while maintaining an "Outperform" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst ongoing market analysis and firm valuations for the investment management and fund operations company. The article also notes other analysts, including BMO Capital and Wolfe Research, have recently adjusted their price targets for KKR.

feed.title: Haisco Grants AbbVie Exclusive Rights to Advance Novel Pain Medicines
feed.summary: Haisco Pharmaceutical Group Co. Ltd. has forged an exclusive licensing agreement with AbbVie, granting AbbVie global rights (excluding mainland China, Hong Kong, and Macau) to develop, manufacture, and commercialize novel pain medicines. Haisco will receive an upfront payment of $30 million, with potential for up to $715 million in development, regulatory, and commercial milestone payments, plus tiered royalties on future net sales. This partnership aims to accelerate the global development of innovative pain therapies by leveraging AbbVie's expertise in neuroscience and commercial capabilities.

feed.title: Conagra Brands hires new CEO
feed.summary: Conagra Brands has appointed John Brase as its new President and Chief Executive Officer, effective June 1, replacing Sean Connolly. Brase previously served as President and COO of The J.M. Smucker Co., bringing a strong track record of leadership in the consumer-packaged goods industry. Connolly, who led Conagra for 11 years, is stepping down from his role and the board of directors.

feed.title: RBC Capital Adjusts UDR Price Target to $37 From $39, Maintains Sector Perform Rating
feed.summary: RBC Capital has adjusted its price target for UDR (UDR) to $37, down from $39, while reiterating a Sector Perform rating. This adjustment reflects a recent analyst move as reported on April 13, 2026, by MT Newswires. Other firms like KeyBanc, Morgan Stanley, JPMorgan, Mizuho, Barclays, Truist, Scotiabank, BNP Paribas, and Piper Sandler have also recently updated their price targets and ratings for UDR.

feed.title: RBC Capital Adjusts Mid-America Apartment Communities Price Target to $134 From $136, Maintains Sector Perform Rating
feed.summary: RBC Capital has decreased its price target for Mid-America Apartment Communities (MAA) from $136 to $134, while retaining a Sector Perform rating. This adjustment reflects a recent change in analyst recommendations for the residential REIT. Other firms, including Baird, Evercore ISI, Truist, Morgan Stanley, and Scotiabank, have also recently adjusted their price targets for MAA.

feed.title: BMO raises Duke Energy stock price target to $143 on growth upside
feed.summary: BMO Capital has increased its price target for Duke Energy (NYSE:DUK) to $143 from $136, maintaining an Outperform rating. The firm anticipates Duke Energy will report first-quarter 2026 earnings on May 5, with investors focusing on regulatory updates and potential growth upside from data center onboarding activity. Despite the stock trading near its 52-week high, InvestingPro data suggests it might be overvalued at its current price of $131.79.

feed.title: Another Year of Ford’s Commitment to America
feed.summary: Ford CEO Jim Farley reiterates the company's commitment to American manufacturing, highlighting that Ford continues to lead in U.S. vehicle assembly, exports, and hourly autoworker employment in 2025. He emphasizes the economic impact of keeping manufacturing jobs in the U.S. and announces plans for further investment and job creation in upcoming years to support new vehicle and battery production.

feed.title: DLH Holdings Corp. joins healthcare leaders for collaborative innovation event
feed.summary: DLH Holdings Corp. recently participated in the NMCSD DHA Academic Research Competition and Innovation Day, an event focused on collaborative advancements in healthcare research and operational excellence. This involvement highlights DLH's commitment to supporting research-led innovations. The company has also been advancing AI tools to unify federal data for Warfighter health and readiness, and to strengthen U.S. defenses.

feed.title: Citigroup Inc.'s long position in H-shares of Ganfeng Lithium increases to 5.7% on Apr 2 from 5.08%, HKEX filing shows
feed.summary: An HKEX filing indicates that Citigroup Inc. increased its long position in the H-shares of Ganfeng Lithium to 5.7% on April 2, up from 5.08%. This adjustment reflects a notable change in Citigroup's investment in the lithium producer's H-shares. The filing provides transparency regarding institutional holdings in the company.

feed.title: Chipotle (CMG) Unveils Redesigned Rewards Program and App Experience
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG) has launched a redesigned Chipotle Rewards program and an updated app interface, available in the U.S. and Canada. The "Rewards on Repeat" initiative aims to boost customer engagement with more frequent rewards, flexibility, and gamification, streamlining features for easier tracking and offers. Despite strong profitability and growth, the company has seen $2.6 million in insider selling, which might signal caution for potential investors.

feed.title: Revvity to Hold Earnings Call on Tuesday, May 5, 2026
feed.summary: Revvity, Inc. (NYSE: RVTY) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results before market open on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. The company will host a conference call on the same day at 7:30 a.m. ET to discuss these results, featuring President and CEO Prahlad Singh and CFO Max Krakowiak. A live audio webcast will be accessible on the Investors section of Revvity's website.

feed.title: RTX’s Collins Aerospace launches PHEDRE Consortium to advance next-generation propeller technologies
feed.summary: RTX's Collins Aerospace has launched the PHEDRE Consortium to lead research and development for next-generation turboprop propellers. The initiative, supported by a France 2030 grant, focuses on reducing noise, weight, and aerodynamic impact while enhancing aircraft efficiency and passenger comfort. Collins Aerospace Ratier-Figeac aims to advance design methods, improve simulation capabilities, and elevate service offerings for propeller operators through this collaboration.

feed.title: News | Bell selects five RTX systems for U.S Army's Future Long Range Assault Aircraft
feed.summary: Collins Aerospace, an RTX business, has secured multiple contracts from Bell Textron Inc. to supply five crucial systems for the U.S. Army's next-generation MV-75 Future Long Range Assault Aircraft (FLRAA). These systems, including main power generation and cockpit seating, will enable the FLRAA to achieve twice the speed and range of the current fleet. The program emphasizes digital engineering and a modular open systems approach to ensure long-term efficiency and adaptability for the Army.

feed.title: Enovis to Host First Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call on May 7th
feed.summary: Enovis Corporation (NYSE: ENOV) announced it will host an investor conference call and live webcast on Thursday, May 7th, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss its first quarter 2026 financial results. The company will issue an earnings press release earlier that morning. Investors can access the webcast and related presentation via the "Investors" section of Enovis's website.

feed.title: Finacity Facilitates Increase and Expansion of Accounts Receivable Securitization Program to $2 Billion for Bunge Global SA (NYSE:BG)
feed.summary: Finacity has facilitated the expansion of Bunge Global SA's Accounts Receivable Securitization Program from $1.5 billion to $2 billion. This increase also integrates the recently merged company Viterra Limited into the program. Bunge Global SA is a leading global agribusiness and food company focused on connecting farmers and consumers.

feed.title: Data I/O Announces New Vision, New Products and Services, New Look - The NEW Data I/O
feed.summary: Data I/O Corporation announced a complete transformation, including a redesigned website and new digital tools. The company is introducing an on-site Programming-as-a-Service (PaaS) offering, leveraging AI for tech support, and planning next-generation programming systems for the second half of 2026. These changes emphasize a shift towards being a comprehensive data provisioning solutions and services provider, with a focus on faster, smaller, and more reliable systems.

feed.title: 13 New 4-Star Stocks This Week
feed.summary: This article identifies 13 US-listed stocks that Morningstar analysts have rated as 4-star "undervalued" due to recent price drops, including Verizon Communications, Intuit, Automatic Data Processing, Cadence Design Systems, and Cloudflare. It explains Morningstar's rating methodology, which considers stock price, fair value estimate, and uncertainty rating, and notes that the overall US market remains moderately undervalued. The piece provides detailed metrics for the top five new 4-star stocks by market capitalization.

feed.title: Gartner predicts half of new warehouses built in developed markets will be human-optional facilities by 2030
feed.summary: Gartner forecasts that by 2030, 50% of new warehouses in developed markets will be designed as "robot-centric" facilities, where human labor is optional. This shift is driven by a less willing workforce for manual tasks, rising labor costs, and a constrained labor supply, prompting chief supply chain officers to accelerate the adoption of intralogistics smart robotics. The new warehouse designs will prioritize flexibility, efficiency, and adaptability, with AI-orchestrated operations allowing for continuous self-optimization and reduced reliance on fixed infrastructure.

feed.title: Citigroup Inc.'s short position in H-shares of Ganfeng Lithium increased to 2.85% on Apr 2 from 2.29%, HKEX filing shows
feed.summary: Citigroup Inc.'s short position in H-shares of Ganfeng Lithium Group Co., Ltd. increased to 2.85% on April 2, 2026, up from 2.29%. This information comes from a filing with the Hong Kong Stock Exchange (HKEX). The article also notes a contemporaneous increase in Citigroup's long position in the same H-shares.

feed.title: BofA Names Olena Lifset Oklahoma City President
feed.summary: Bank of America has appointed Olena Lifset as its new Oklahoma City president, succeeding Tony Shinn, who is retiring after 20 years. Lifset, previously a Global Commercial Banking market executive, will be responsible for connecting clients, teammates, and communities to the company's services and driving collaboration across its lines of business. She brings nearly 25 years of experience in commercial banking, capital markets, and management consulting, and will build upon Shinn's success in growing the company's market share and relationships in Oklahoma City.

feed.title: Hubbell sets April 30 earnings release, 10 a.m. ET webcast
feed.summary: Hubbell (NYSE: HUBB) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results before market open on April 30, 2026, followed by an Analysts' Conference Call at 10:00 AM ET on the same day. Investors can access the press release, live audio, and materials via the company's investor relations sections on its website, www.hubbell.com. Hubbell, headquartered in Shelton, CT, reported 2025 revenues of $5.8 billion.

feed.title: Moderna Impfstoff (Spikevax): mRNA Pivot Beyond COVID Fuels Uncertain Path
feed.summary: Moderna's Spikevax vaccine sales have significantly declined post-pandemic, prompting the company to pivot its mRNA technology towards new applications in cancer and other infectious diseases. This strategic shift presents both long-term potential for investors and health innovations for consumers, but also carries inherent biotech risks and financial pressures due to rising R&D costs and market competition. The article highlights the importance of monitoring regulatory approvals and pipeline developments to assess Moderna's future sustainability and stock performance.

feed.title: Alphabet Stock Dips in Pre-Market as AI Spending and Antitrust Pressures Weigh on GOOG
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc. Class C shares dipped in pre-market trading due to investor concerns over heavy AI capital spending, ongoing antitrust challenges, and broader geopolitical tensions. The company faces massive infrastructure investments to compete in the generative AI race, projected to be $175-$185 billion in 2026, which is pressuring near-term margins. Regulatory headwinds in the U.S. and Europe also remain a significant overhang, with market watchers anticipating more insights from the upcoming Q1 earnings report.

feed.title: EXL brings investors to Nasdaq MarketSite for May 13 strategy event
feed.summary: EXL (NASDAQ: EXLS) announced it will host an Investor and Analyst Day on May 13, 2026, at the NASDAQ MarketSite in Times Square, New York. CEO Rohit Kapoor and his executive team will discuss the company's data and AI strategy along with its latest solutions. A webcast replay of the event will be available for those unable to attend.

feed.title: RBC Capital Adjusts Invitation Homes PT to $28 From $29, Maintains Sector Perform Rating
feed.summary: RBC Capital has adjusted its price target for Invitation Homes (INVH) to $28 from $29, while maintaining a Sector Perform rating for the company. This news follows several other analyst adjustments to Invitation Homes' price target in March, with ratings ranging from Neutral to Overweight. Invitation Homes recently announced a quarterly cash dividend payable on or before April 17, 2026.
